title: Mixture of Experts
content:
# Interview Prep: MoE

## Q1: Why do MoE models require load-balancing auxiliary losses during training?

### Standard Answer
Without load-balancing losses, the routing network falls into a winner-take-all feedback loop. Early in training, a few experts are selected slightly more often than others, causing their weights to receive more updates. The router continues to favor them, leaving other experts untrained.
